estadisticas.descripcion: Each number represents a life that has been touched by the love and dedication of our volunteers. We work tirelessly so that these stories have a happy ending.
estadisticas.frase: — "Transforming pain into hope, one paw at a time."

vidas.desc: Animals under our constant care at the shelter.

adoptados.desc: Homes transformed by the love of a rescued animal.

compromiso.desc: Our dedication is absolute to ensure that no animal suffers abandonment again.

ejes_trabajo.descripcion: Our lines of work focus on comprehensive solutions for animal welfare in our region.

items.descripcion: We manage and promote sterilization campaigns in different sectors to prevent uncontrolled reproduction.
We provide urgent treatments and surgeries for shelter animals and strays.
We strive to make animals feel loved and protected, reducing the trauma of abandonment.
We ensure compliance with Colombian legislation against animal abuse and exploitation.
We place animals in optimal homes, including sterilization and rigorous follow-up.
We join forces among volunteers, sponsors, and supporters to strengthen animal welfare.

hero.descripcion: We fight for freedom, respect and justice for all animals, without exception of species.

mission.titulo: We raise awareness and educate about animal abuse
mission.p1: The Corteza Terrestre Foundation was founded and began early in 2007. We are a non-profit organization that works voluntarily, dedicated to the defense and protection of animals. We work to raise community awareness, creating spaces for education and basic care for street animals or victims of abuse, thus promoting important changes in society.
mission.p2: We currently have a temporary home, where we shelter more than 60 animals between dogs and cats rescued from the streets and abandonment. We rehabilitate them and later put them up for adoption. The members of the organization are vegan or vegetarian, because we respect the freedom of all animals without exception of species.
mission.p3_start: Within the Corteza Terrestre foundation, we carry out activities for the economic support of the animals, such as collecting monetary funds or other physical aids, elementary for the functioning of the shelter, donated by citizens. We also sell items to reduce waste such as wooden brushes, collapsible cups, etc.; we also offer personalized gifts under our brand
mission.p3_end: such as mugs, t-shirts, water bottles, bracelets, caps, keychains, among others; this way we aim to be self-sustainable.

stats.mensaje_titulo: To abandon an animal is to abandon a family member!
stats.mensaje_desc: The animals we rescue spend months in the shelter until they find a home. If you must part with them, look for a home on your own initiative.

team.descripcion: Dedicated people committed to the animal cause

testimonials.titulo: What they say about the Foundation

items.text: Excellent work you are doing. These people contribute to the preservation of the life of these wonderful, loving beings full of innocence.
items.author: Chris Giraldo

items.text: They do the most beautiful work, caring, protecting, and loving animals, especially those without a home.
items.author: Claudia P. Cifuentes

items.text: Their work is selfless and honest. They are truly sensitive people towards animals and fight every day for their well-being.
items.author: Norma Gómez

modal.desc_adoptar: To start the adoption process for {{nombre}}, contact us and complete the application form. We want to make sure it's the perfect home.
modal.desc_apadrinar: Sponsoring {{nombre}} means covering their food and veterinary care expenses. You will receive periodic updates on their well-being.

compromisos.desc_principal: There are many reasons to adopt an animal, but the best of all is that you will save a life and in return you will have their unconditional and unparalleled love.
compromisos.titulo_apadrinar: When you sponsor, you commit to:
items_apadrinar: A minimum monthly aid of $50,000 COP for the animal you decide to sponsor.
Let the foundation cover the animal's basic needs with the contributed money.
Be responsible for extra expenses in medicine or treatments, if necessary.
You can visit, even take them for a walk outside the foundation's facilities, for one or several days. This will be agreed upon previously due to the logistics involved.
compromisos.titulo_adoptar: When you adopt, you commit to:
items_adoptar: Not abandon your pet for any reason (old age, behavior, illness, etc.).

Treat them with love and respect. You will not leave them exposed to inclement weather, nor to prolonged solitude, especially during holidays, you will not hand them over to zoonosis, pounds or universities for experimentation, much less to be commercialized or exploited.
Provide adequate medical care when needed.
Spay/neuter your furry friend. This is a fundamental commitment; if you refuse, we refuse to approve their adoption.
Receive follow-up visits. For us, it is essential to guarantee the adaptation of our animals to their new home, which is why we do follow-up visits.

cta.descripcion: Leave us your details and we will notify you when a new animal arrives that matches what you are looking for.

hero.descripcion: Donate food and help us continue protecting the rescued animals of Armenia and Quindío.

info.p1: Our campaign consists of placing collection boxes with the foundation's logo in commercial places in Quindío, with Armenia being the main city.
info.p2: The participating businesses do not violate the integrity of animals. There, people can leave their contribution regardless of its value, which is completely destined to sustain the shelter.
info.frase: "Every coin counts to provide a better quality of life for our rescued animals."

cities.subtitulo: Find the nearest collection box and leave your mark

hero.descripcion: Donate your time and join us in the work of caring for and protecting animals
hero.texto_1: If you are over 14 years old, and are committed, respectful, tolerant, and patient towards all species, here you will find a brief description of the various volunteer areas to join this work.
hero.texto_2_inicio: Your profession doesn't matter, just having
hero.texto_2_medio: . You can also do your high school community service and university internships.

areas.subtitulo: Choose the area that best fits your availability and skills

lista.title: Cleaning
lista.description: Go to the shelter one Sunday a month, carry out a general cleaning day in kennels, catteries, hallways, food storage room, medicine room, and surroundings. Our animals also need attention and petting.

lista.title: Adoption Days
lista.description: Go to an adoption day one Saturday a month, give information to passersby about the importance of adoption, the different ways to help a street animal, and how to donate to the foundation.

lista.title: Animal Transport
lista.description: We help transport our animals to the vet, adoption days, and rescues. We do not have our own transport, so this would be a great help to the Foundation.

lista.title: Donations
lista.description: Serve as support from Monday to Friday in the collection of pet food donations, recycling, medicines, furniture, etc.

lista.title: Visits and Adoption Follow-ups
lista.description: We visit the new families to verify they have an optimal space and are prepared. Later we make follow-up visits. Receive a guide on how to treat adopters with sensitivity.

lista.title: Help at Events
lista.description: Support animal and environmental awareness demonstrations and events. We need help organizing, selling vouchers, and giving awareness talks.

requisitos.subtitulo: The only thing you need is a passion for animals

lista.title: Over 14 years old
lista.description: You must be of legal age to participate as a volunteer in our activities

lista.title: Commitment and Respect
lista.description: Be committed, respectful, and tolerant of all animal species without exception

lista.title: Valid Health Insurance
lista.description: Have active and valid health insurance to guarantee your protection

lista.title: Patience and Empathy
lista.description: Have patience, empathy, and willingness to work in a team with other volunteers

requisitos.cta_texto:
Do you want to be part of this adventure? We would love to have you.
You can also do your high school community service or university internships with us.

testimonios.subtitulo: See how our volunteers are making a difference

lista.name: María García
lista.text: Being a volunteer at Corteza Terrestre has been one of the best decisions of my life. Seeing how the little animals receive care and love is priceless.

lista.name: Carlos Rodríguez
lista.text: I thought I could only help in one way, but here I discovered that my truck could make a big difference in the lives of many rescued animals.

lista.name: Ana Martínez
lista.text: Adoption days are exciting. Knowing that I have helped connect an animal with its new family fills my heart with joy.

secciones.contenido_p1: At the Corteza Terrestre Foundation (hereinafter "the Foundation", "we" or "our"), we are committed to the protection and respect of your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, protect, and share the personal information of users (hereinafter "the User" or "you") who visit our website
secciones.contenido_p2: , as well as those who interact with us through adoption, sponsorship, donation forms, or general inquiries.
secciones.contenido_p3: By browsing our website or using our services, you accept the practices described in this policy.

secciones.p1: We collect personal information only when you provide it to us voluntarily. The data we may request includes, but is not limited to:
secciones.li_1_val: Full name, phone number, residential address, and email.
secciones.li_2_val: Data contained in the "Adoption Commitment" or "Sponsorship Commitment", information about lifestyle, family composition, and economic capacity (strictly what is necessary to guarantee the well-being of the animals).
secciones.li_3_val: IP address, browser type, browsing time, and pages visited (collected automatically through cookies and analytics tools to improve our website).

secciones.p1: The personal data provided will be used exclusively for the following purposes:
secciones.li_1_val: Evaluate applications, process the forms (commitments) sent to our email, and follow up on the animals given in adoption.
secciones.li_2_val: Process economic or in-kind contributions and coordinate participation in Foundation activities.
secciones.li_3_val: Respond to inquiries, doubts, or comments sent through our customer service channels or website.
secciones.li_4_val: Send relevant information about sterilization days, events, shelter news, and fundraising campaigns (always with the option to unsubscribe).
secciones.li_5_val: Meet requirements from competent authorities regarding the protection and responsible ownership of animals.

secciones.titulo: Rights of the Data Subject (Habeas Data)
secciones.p1: According to Law 1581 of 2012 and complementary regulations in Colombia, as the owner of your personal data, you have the right to:
secciones.li_1: Know, update, and rectify your personal data before the Foundation.
secciones.li_2: Request proof of the authorization granted for the processing of your data.
secciones.li_3: Be informed about the use that has been given to your personal data.
secciones.li_4: Revoke the authorization and/or request the deletion of the data when the principles, rights, and constitutional and legal guarantees are not respected in the processing.
secciones.li_5: Access your personal data that has been subject to Processing free of charge.
secciones.p2: To exercise any of these rights, you can send a formal request to our email:

secciones.p1: The Corteza Terrestre Foundation adopts the necessary technical, human, and administrative measures to guarantee the security of personal data and prevent its alteration, loss, consultation, unauthorized or fraudulent use or access. We do not sell, rent, or share our users' personal information with third parties for commercial purposes.
secciones.p2: We will only share information when strictly necessary to comply with a legal or judicial requirement.

secciones.p1: Our website may use "cookies" to improve the user experience. Cookies are small text files that are stored on the user's device to remember preferences and analyze web traffic. You can configure your browser to reject all cookies or to notify you when a cookie is sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, some website features may not operate correctly.

Our website may contain links to other sites of interest (e.g., social networks or payment platforms). Once you click on these links and leave our page, we no longer have control over the site to which you are redirected and, therefore, we are not responsible for the privacy terms or the protection of your data on those third-party sites.

The Corteza Terrestre Foundation reserves the right to update or modify this Privacy Policy at any time to adapt it to legislative developments or new dynamics of the organization. We recommend you review this page periodically. Any change will be notified by publishing the updated version at this same URL.
If you have any questions, doubts, or comments about this Privacy Policy and Data Processing, please contact us:

contacto_page.descripcion: We are here to listen to you and work together for animal welfare. Write to us and we will get in touch soon.
